content_sections: System Overview with high-level architecture diagrams
MVVM Architecture Pattern with component breakdown
Technology Stack (Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Room, Hilt, Coroutines, Flow)
Data Layer Architecture with entities, DAOs, repositories, and mappers
UI Layer Architecture with screen composables, state management, navigation
Dependency Injection with Hilt module structure
Additional content truncated but covering comprehensive system design
file_insights.purpose: Comprehensive system design documentation for Inventory APK Android application

patterns_discovered.description: Clear separation between Model (data layer), View (UI), and ViewModel (mediator)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Testability, lifecycle awareness, reactive UI updates

patterns_discovered.description: Abstract data sources from rest of application through repository interfaces
patterns_discovered.benefit: Decoupling, flexibility to swap data sources, testability

patterns_discovered.description: Using sealed classes/interfaces for UI state (Loading, Success, Error)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Type-safe state representation, exhaustive when expressions

patterns_discovered.description: Conversion functions between database entities and domain models
patterns_discovered.benefit: Clean separation of database schema from business logic

patterns_discovered.description: Flow and StateFlow for reactive data propagation
patterns_discovered.benefit: Automatic UI updates when data changes, proper lifecycle handling

patterns_discovered.description: Three-layer architecture: Presentation (Compose UI) → Domain (Use Cases) → Data (Repositories)

gotchas_discovered.description: API 24 (Android 7.0) chosen as minimum, covering ~95% of devices but limiting some features
gotchas_discovered.impact: Trade-off between coverage and feature availability

gotchas_discovered.description: Decision between ML Kit and ZXing not finalized, to be evaluated during implementation
gotchas_discovered.impact: Implementation detail not locked, requires later decision point

gotchas_discovered.description: Cloud sync, conflict resolution, and multi-device sync deferred to future enhancements
gotchas_discovered.impact: Initial MVP offline-only, significant work needed for sync capability

gotchas_discovered.description: Encrypted database mentioned as consideration for sensitive data, not yet implemented
gotchas_discovered.impact: Security enhancement deferred, data stored in plain SQLite initially

approach_outcome.deliverable: Complete system design documentation for Inventory APK
approach_outcome.completeness: Comprehensive coverage of architecture, technology stack, data/UI layers, and DI structure
quality_indicators: Detailed diagrams and flow examples provided

recommendations.recommendation: Begin with data layer implementation (Room entities, DAOs, repositories) as foundation
recommendations.rationale: Critical path for offline-first functionality and clean architecture

recommendations.recommendation: Evaluate and select between ML Kit and ZXing early in implementation phase
recommendations.rationale: Key feature for inventory scanning, decision impacts dependency choices

recommendations.recommendation: Strictly follow sealed interface pattern for UI state throughout application
recommendations.rationale: Ensures type-safe state handling and prevents invalid state combinations

recommendations.recommendation: Leverage MVVM separation to implement comprehensive unit tests for ViewModels and UseCases
recommendations.rationale: Architecture enables testing without Android framework dependencies

recommendations.recommendation: Plan encrypted database implementation before storing sensitive inventory data
recommendations.rationale: Deferred but critical for production deployment

recommendations.recommendation: Keep ARCHITECTURE.md synchronized with actual implementation as design evolves
recommendations.rationale: Living documentation prevents technical debt and maintains team alignment
